title: scrophularia tenuipes
intro: Scrophularia tenuipes, also known as Himalayan figwort or scorpion flower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits associated with S. tenuipes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. S. tenuipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
